description.de: Sammlung offener APIs und Building Blocks für Identität, Daten und Zahlungen auf Bevölkerungsebene – betrieben von UIDAI, NPCI und MeitY.
description.en: A collection of open APIs and building blocks for identity, data and payments at population scale, operated by UIDAI, NPCI and MeitY.

rationale.de: Identitätsschicht des India Stack, betrieben von der UIDAI.
rationale.en: Identity layer of the India Stack, operated by UIDAI.

rationale.de: Echtzeit-Zahlungsschicht des India Stack, betrieben von der NPCI.
rationale.en: Real-time payments layer of the India Stack, operated by NPCI.

rationale.de: Open-Source-Identitätsplattform mit Vorbildfunktion für andere Länder.
rationale.en: Open-source identity platform serving as a model for other countries.
Primary language of the UPI and MOSIP backends.
De-facto backend framework of UPI and MOSIP.
Frontend framework of many India Stack portals.

rationale.de: Leichtgewichtige APIs und Tooling im India Stack.
rationale.en: Lightweight APIs and tooling in the India Stack.
Standard database for many backend services.
Event streaming for UPI load peaks and real-time processing.
In-memory caching for high-frequency UPI requests.
Container orchestration for scalable India Stack services.
Authorisation in the DEPA consent layer.
Transport encryption of all India Stack endpoints.
